The '''''Guardian Mantis''''' was [[Vana Sage]]'s trademark ship. It was a unique [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] of [[Xi Char/Legends|Xi Char]] design.

==Characteristics==
An extremely maneuverable three-winged craft, it could brake to a complete stop midflight as well as enter a stealth mode. Vana's [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]], [[Mod-3]], maintained and repaired the ship while on board.<ref name="SF guide" />

[[File:GuardianMantis.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The ''Mantis'' destroys [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]].]]

It was armed with two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], a [[nano missile]] launcher,<ref name="g2" /> and a unique [[ion encumbrance system]]. This system launched small ion-enabled "tags," projectiles which attached to enemy vessels and caused an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ionization]] effect which disabled their [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]].<ref name="SF guide" /> These tags could also be used as homing beacons for the nano missiles.

==History==
Vana Sage used this ship as early as<ref name="SW:SF" /> [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes that the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] happens in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> when she, along with the pirate [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] and [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] pilot [[Rhys Dallows]], [[Battle of Eos (Invasion of Naboo)|destroyed]] a droid factory on [[Eos]] and [[Skirmish over Naboo|attacked]] a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] convoy over Naboo, as well as [[Battle of the Naboo resistance base|defending]] a [[Naboo Resistance]] [[Naboo resistance base|base]] on the planet's surface with Nym.<ref name="SW:SF">[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']]</ref> She continued to use this fighter years later and was last seen searching for news of her friend [[Reti]].<ref name="SW:JF">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}
